item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Honestly i'm usually not fond of rewrite or replacement for old articles but this one is spot on.

I didn't really like the old Shapey, first it was kind of dull, didn't seem to be for children, and had no connection with the other mister. Not only is this version better, but makes a pretty good mister on his own. It's fun for kids (a shapeshifting person you can look like whoever you want), but it add something to the Little Mister lore with his job with Wondertainment. It's even way better executed than M.Hot who is only defined by his ability to find "trendy" things which makes him dull as a Mister.
And finally, the three "ideas" of other misters you're showing are good concepts on their own.

Great job !

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Researcher Harling: So what you are saying is that you were the first one that came to exitence?

I think this is meant to be existence?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: It got deleted. And although I don't remember if it was the author's choice or just the standard -10 deletion process, I can see why it's gone. The old version didn't have much of an interesting anomaly like Moon or Lost, and it certainly didn't have much of personality, with the only thing kind of interesting being that it didn't want to be contained near the others (which sadly was never explained).

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: What happened to the old Mr. Shapey?

item.title: Ok, I think it's about time for a comment
item.content:encoded:
Hey y'all, the author here. I figured it's time I made a comment here. I originally left it blank because I felt (and still am) nervous about this scip, but nobody cares about that.

Anyways, I'm happy that the reviews for this scip are positive so far, since not only is the last Little Mister, but also my first article. So yeah, thanks y'all.
